items.title: BOM + initial wiring
items.desc: Pi Zero 2 W, 4 × Xiaomi LYWSDCGQ sensors, 1 × ntfy.sh container on the LAN. Total cost target < £80.

items.title: Pi firmware
items.desc: Go binary on the Pi: ble-scanner + sqlite-writer + alert-checker as one process. systemd unit, no Docker.

items.title: Web UI
items.desc: Static HTML/CSS/JS embedded in the Go binary via go:embed. Charts via uPlot. CSV download by serving the SQLite query result as text/csv.

items.title: Deploy + handover
items.desc: One install script: scp the binary, install the unit, set Wi-Fi sensor credentials, test alert end-to-end, hand the homeowner a printed cheat-sheet.
